unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.body: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page and discard them?
landing.title: Looking For More
landing.subtitle: Coordinate your guild's raid schedule, track role coverage, and sign in with Battle.net.
landing.sharedSchedule.title: Shared Schedule
landing.sharedSchedule.body: Keep your whole raid on the same page with a shared run calendar.
landing.roleCoverage.title: Role Coverage
landing.roleCoverage.body: See at a glance which roles are filled and where you still need signups.
landing.battleNetSignIn.title: Battle.net Sign-In
landing.battleNetSignIn.body: No extra accounts — log in with your existing Battle.net credentials.
login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Connect your Battle.net account to get started.
loginFailed.title: Login Failed
loginFailed.subtitle: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.
goodbye.title: Goodbye
goodbye.body1: Your account has been deleted. We hope to see you again sometime.
goodbye.body2: All your data has been removed from our systems.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controller.heading: Data Controller
privacy.controller.body: This application is operated by the guild master of the associated World of Warcraft guild.
privacy.data.heading: Data We Collect
privacy.data.body: We collect your Battle.net account identifier, your World of Warcraft character names and realm, and your locale preference. No payment data is collected.
privacy.cookies.heading: Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: We use a single session cookie to keep you logged in. No third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.thirdParty.heading: Third Parties
privacy.thirdParty.body: We use Blizzard Entertainment's Battle.net OAuth service for authentication. No personal data is sold or shared with other third parties.
privacy.retention.heading: Retention
privacy.retention.body: Your data is retained for as long as your account exists. You can delete your account at any time from the Characters page, which will remove all personal data immediately.
privacy.rights.heading: Your Rights
privacy.rights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, and erase your personal data. Contact us at the address below to exercise these rights.
privacy.contact.heading: Contact
privacy.contact.error: Unable to load contact email. Please try again later.
runs.title: Runs
runs.selectPrompt: Select a run to see details.
runs.signup.title: Your signup
runs.signup.cancelConfirmBody: This removes your signup from the run.
runs.signup.guildRankBlocked: Your guild rank does not allow signing up for this run.
runs.signup.noCharacters: No characters are available for signup. Refresh your characters first.
runs.signup.charactersNeedRefresh: Refresh your Battle.net characters before signing up.
runs.signup.charactersLoadFailed: Failed to load characters for signup.
runs.signup.failed: Failed to sign up. Please try again.
runs.signup.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel signup. Please try again.
runs.signup.closed: Signups are closed for this run.
createRun.title: Schedule a run
createRun.keyLevel.hintAny: Your starting key level. Others can sign up without a key.
createRun.keyLevel.hintSpecific: Your starting keystone. Others can sign up without a key.
createRun.keyLevel.wnlDescription: Weekly no-leavers — a +10 run guarantees the top-tier item from next week's vault
createRun.visibility.guildDisabledReason: Your guild rank doesn't allow creating guild runs — ask an officer.
createRun.failed: Failed to create run. Please try again.
createRun.error.network: Couldn't reach the server. Try again?
createRun.error.guildRankDenied: Your guild rank doesn't allow creating guild runs.
editRun.title: Edit Run
editRun.confirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this run? This cannot be undone.
editRun.saveFailed: Failed to save run. Please try again.
editRun.deleteFailed: Failed to delete run. Please try again.
editRun.error.staleEtag: This run was changed by someone else. Reload the page to see the latest details before saving.
characters.title: My Characters
characters.sort.name: Name
characters.empty: No characters found. Try refreshing from Battle.net.
characters.deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
characters.deleteAccount.body: This will permanently remove all your data — characters, run signups, and preferences. This action cannot be undone.
characters.deleteAccount.confirm: To confirm, type FORGET ME in the box below.
characters.deleteAccount.failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
characters.deleteAccount.error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
characters.error.selectFailed: Failed to set active character. Please try again.
guild.title: Guild
guild.noGuild.title: No guild found
guild.noGuild.body: You are not currently associated with a guild. Please contact your guild master to get set up.
guild.chip.cannotCreate: Guild run creation blocked for your rank
guild.chip.canSignup: You can sign up to guild runs
guild.chip.cannotSignup: Guild signup blocked for your rank
guild.setupRequiredExplanation: Your guild needs initial setup before you can access runs. Configure the settings below to get started.
guild.rankSyncStale: Rank sync is stale. Guild settings are locked until roster data refreshes.
guildAdmin.title: Guild Admin
guildAdmin.rankSyncStale: Rank sync data is stale. Settings cannot be saved until rank data is refreshed.
adminReference.title: Reference data
adminReference.description: Pulls the latest journal-instance, playable-specialization, and journal-expansion data from the Blizzard Game Data API and writes it to blob. Takes about a minute.
instances.title: Instances
instances.columns.name: Name
notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.body: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist.
